remarks.text: Fable gets another bump
remarks.content: One of the consequences of GPT-5.6 Sol being clearly a Fable/Mythos class model is that Anthropic have, once again, bumped the date that Fable stops being available in their Claude Max plans: We're extending Claud
remarks.contentTranslation: GPT-5.6 Sol显然是一个寓言/神话类模型的后果之一是， Anthropic再次推迟了寓言在他们的Claude Max计划中不再可用的日期：我们正在扩展Claud
remarks.translation: 寓言获得另一个颠簸

remarks.name: Swyx
remarks.role: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.
remarks.text:
if you only learned about jevons paradox primarily wrt software demand in the age of agentic engineering, you may not have fully internalized jevons parodox’s impact under the conditions of:

- humans who can wield coding agents well*
- coding agents breaking containment to all other knowledge work

as the efficiency of labor goes up/unit cost of knowledge work goes broadly down, the demand for total work and better knowledge goes up, not down.

what happened to coding isnt the exception; it’s the herald.

*aka AI Engineers
remarks.translation:
如果你只了解jevons悖论，主要是agentic engineering时代的软件需求，那么在以下情况下，你可能没有完全内化jevons悖论的影响： -能够很好地使用编码Agent的人* -随着劳动力效率的提高/知识工作的单位成本大幅下降，对总工作和更好知识的需求上升，而不是下降，编码Agent打破了对所有其他知识工作的遏制。
编码发生了什么不是例外；它是预兆。* aka AI Engineers
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Thibault Sottiaux
remarks.role: Codex & ChatGPT OpenAI
remarks.text:
At different times you complained about speed, code slop, frontend quality, ... With each release we improve and GPT 5.6 Sol is  

✅Fast and token efficient
✅Hardcore at back-end dev
✅Great at front-end
✅Does not use useEffect everywhere 

What is next?
remarks.translation: 在不同的时间，您抱怨速度，代码斜率，前端质量，...随着每个版本的改进， GPT 5.6 SOL在后端开发中是✅快速和代币高效的✅Hardcore在前端✅很棒✅没有在任何地方使用useEffect下一步是什么？
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 AI 编程工具、设计到代码流程和软件生产方式的变化；需要结合产品发布或文档再做事实判断。

remarks.name: Thibault Sottiaux
remarks.role: Codex & ChatGPT OpenAI
remarks.text:
If you aren't yet bold enough to install the Codex app, you can stay in the presence of your orange crab and point it at GPT 5.6 Sol. Takes 5 minutes. Kudos to Theo for explaining one of the ways to get this done.

Step 1: Install CLIProxyAPI
Step 2: Connect
Step 3: Define following alias and enjoy claudex

```
alias claudex='CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL=gpt-5.6-sol \
CLAUDE_CODE_ALWAYS_ENABLE_EFFORT=1 \
CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_TOOL_USE_CONCURRENCY=3 \
ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=false \
claude --model gpt-5.6-sol'
```

If this gets blocked, I owe you a reset.
remarks.translation:
如果您还不够大胆，无法安装Codex应用程序，您可以留在橙色螃蟹面前，并将其指向GPT 5.6 SOL。需要5分钟。感谢Theo解释完成此操作的方法之一。
第1步：安装CLIProxyAPI第2步：连接第3步：定义以下别名并享受claudex `` `alias claudex =' CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL = gpt-5.6-sol\ CLAUDE_CODE_ALWAYS_ENABLE_EFFORT = 1\ CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_TOOL_USE_CONCURRENCY = 3\ ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH = FALSE\ CLAUDE --model gpt-5.6-sol '' '' '` `` ``如果这被阻止，我欠你一个重置。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
The job that AI was supposed to replace is experiencing the opposite of the expected outcome. Software job postings are outpacing other fields.

Why is that? If you lower the cost of production of something that has lots of use cases, people want more things produced. We’ve seen this play out in the industrial world constantly, and now we’re finally seeing it in knowledge work.

Because software now is much lower to cost per unit, people want way more of it. So we start to use software for all new things and people and companies light up more software projects than ever before. 

But because the job itself is not fully automated (and likely won’t be for as far out as we can see), you still need people that understand these systems to maintain the code, decide what to build, run it over the long run, update it, and more. That all requires people to do work. 

The same thing is going to happen in many other fields as well as we bring down the cost of production of previously extremely scarce areas of work. Agents will cause more abundance than replacement.
remarks.translation:
AI应该取代的工作正在经历与预期结果相反的情况。软件职位发布的速度超过了其他领域。为什么会这样？如果你降低了具有大量用例的产品的生产成本，人们希望生产更多的产品。我们经常在工业世界中看到这种情况，现在我们终于在知识工作中看到了它。因为软件现在比单位成本低得多，所以人们想要更多。
因此，我们开始将软件用于所有新事物，个人和公司点亮的软件项目比以往任何时候都多。但由于作业本身并不完全自动化（而且可能不会像我们所看到的那样完全自动化） ，因此您仍然需要了解这些系统的人员来维护代码、决定构建的内容、长期运行它、更新它等等。这一切都需要人们去做工作。
在许多其他领域也会发生同样的事情，因为我们降低了以前极其稀缺的工作领域的生产成本。药物会比替代品产生更多的丰富性。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Garry Tan
remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text:
If you want to supercharge building in California again, you're going to need to repeal and reform CEQA

Millions of units of housing are blocked every year using CEQA. Housing should be built by-right, and not require the level of review it does today. https://t.co/TE4s7Dz7jD
remarks.translation: 如果您想再次为加利福尼亚州的建筑增压，您需要废除和改革CEQA每年有数百万套住房被CEQA封锁。房屋应以权利为基础建造，无需像今天这样的审查级别。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Garry Tan
remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text:
So much could go wrong

But the interesting question is always: what happens if things go right?
remarks.translation: 出错的可能性太大了，但有趣的问题总是：如果一切顺利，会发生什么？

remarks.name: Simon Willison's Blog
remarks.role: AI coding tools, LLM release notes, prompt engineering, datasette ecosystem, developer workflow observations.
remarks.text: The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol
remarks.content: OpenAI's latest flagship model hit general availability this morning , and comes in three sizes: Luna, Terra, and Sol (from smallest to largest). The new models are priced per 1M input/output tokens as Luna $1/$6, Terra $2.50/$15, Sol $5/$30.
remarks.contentTranslation: OpenAI的最新旗舰机型今天早上正式上市，有三种尺寸： Luna、Terra和Sol （从最小到最大）。新型号每100万个输入/输出代币的价格为LUNA $ 1/$ 6 ， TERRA $ 2.50/$ 15 ， SOL $ 5/$ 30。
remarks.translation: 全新GPT-5.6系列： Luna、Terra、Sol
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。
